name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central (permission sets via security group)
status: structure built -- nested-membership adapter (Entra security group -> BC security group container -> permission sets). Live-validation pending a BC environment with the Entra group provisioned as a BC security group + the engine SPN registered as a BC app user with SUPER. Automation-API entity/path names follow the v2.0 securityGroups + permissionSets API; confirm against a live environment's $metadata before flipping status to delivered.
permissionsNeeded: Business Central: an app user (the engine SPN) with the SUPER permission set in the target environment; the Entra group must already exist as a BC SECURITY GROUP (linked to the Entra group objectId) so permission sets can be attached to it

prerequisites.perRowResource: Each row's Resource column = the BC environment selector 'tenantId/environment', e.g. f0fa27a0-.../PRODUCTION. baseUrl is token-expanded with it so one connector covers every BC environment.
prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=businesscentral -> token for https://api.businesscentral.dynamics.com supplied via $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['businesscentral'] (launcher-minted) or Get-AzAccessToken with that resource.
prerequisites.securityGroup: BC supports Entra SECURITY GROUPS natively: the Entra group must be added once as a BC security group (Business Central > Security Groups > New, pick the Entra group). resolveContainer finds that BC security-group record by its azureGroupId == the PIM group objectId; permission sets are then attached to it.
prerequisites.rolesArePermissionSets: BC 'roles' are PERMISSION SETS (e.g. D365 BUS FULL ACCESS, D365 BASIC, LOCAL). listRoles enumerates the environment's permission sets; pick by displayName/permissionSetId.
prerequisites.noActivation: No tenant-wide activation toggle (unlike Defender XDR); the only prerequisites are the app user + the security-group link.
